word: G1285 - διασαφέω - diasaphéō - dee-as-af-eh'-o - Tell unto

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to make clear or plain, to explain, unfold, declare, to tell, announce, narrate
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 andσαφής saphēs (clear); to clear thoroughly, that is, (figuratively) declare: - tell unto.
